title: HY-6 heavy cannon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''HY-6 heavy cannon''' was a design from [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Engineer [[Diran Miciluz]] from [[Hydrospeare Corporation]] improved the range and accuracy of the HY-6 before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. It was then increasingly used by the Empire in aquatic applications.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
